defaultEntry.trigger: ordinary natural-language durable task or explicit meta-theory shortcut

skipConditions: pure read-only query with no durable artifact
already clear request with explicit noQuotaClarification record
gateConditions: missing intent that changes route, scope, risk, acceptance, permission, or non-goal
warningGates: minor wording ambiguity with no route impact

decisionResponsibilities.decisionQuestion: Which missing intent, success, non-goal, permission, or architecture-type fact would change the route?
decisionResponsibilities.userChoiceWhen: Ask only when the answer changes route, scope, risk, acceptance, permission, or non-goal.

skipConditions: fast_path read-only answer with explicit evidence boundary
warningGates: stale global cache that does not affect selected route

decisionResponsibilities.decisionQuestion: Which evidence or capability fact changes candidate routes, owners, risk, scope, or verification?
informationToCollect: external or current evidence when needed
decisionResponsibilities.userChoiceWhen: Ask when evidence exposes multiple valid paths with different user-visible trade-offs.

skipConditions: fast_path read-only answer with no execution route
gateConditions: owner or weapon not selected from Fetch evidence
main thread would become all-purpose executor
warningGates: single obvious path recorded as no_branching_choice

decisionResponsibilities.decisionQuestion: Which owner, weapon, dependency, runtime, OS, lane shape, and verification path best serves the intent?
decisionResponsibilities.userChoiceWhen: Ask before Execution when candidate routes differ in scope, cost, risk, owner, acceptance, or persistence.

skipConditions: capability gap requires creation before execution
gateConditions: missing approval for external write or global install
stages.defaultOwner: selected worker or selected capability provider

decisionResponsibilities.decisionQuestion: Did execution discover a route-changing fact that should pause, continue, narrow, or return to Thinking?
decisionResponsibilities.userChoiceWhen: Ask when execution discovers a new trade-off or permission/scope change that the selected route did not cover.

skipConditions: fast_path read-only answer with no durable artifact
warningGates: minor polish issue that does not affect acceptance

decisionResponsibilities.decisionQuestion: Is the chain good enough for the claimed result, and which finding changes acceptance or revision direction?
decisionOutputs: ask user on quality versus speed trade-off
decisionResponsibilities.userChoiceWhen: Ask only when a review finding requires a user preference rather than a correctness fix.

skipConditions: low-risk non-public local edit with recorded skip reason

decisionResponsibilities.decisionQuestion: Is Review's standard strong enough for the intended claim, especially public-ready or release-grade claims?
decisionResponsibilities.userChoiceWhen: No direct interaction; route back to Review or Verification when the claim standard changes.

skipConditions: no mutation and no completion claim
gateConditions: runtime, install, global sync, hook, dependency, security, or credential boundary
warningGates: ordinary low-risk step that does not make a completion claim

decisionResponsibilities.decisionQuestion: Which fresh evidence proves, weakens, or limits the completion claim?
decisionResponsibilities.userChoiceWhen: No direct interaction unless human acceptance or accepted-risk closure is explicitly required.

skipConditions: no reusable lesson, recorded as none-with-reason
gateConditions: skill, tool, MCP, hook, workflow, runtime, or OS lesson should survive the run

decisionResponsibilities.decisionQuestion: What reusable lesson, capability gap, scar, or none-with-reason should survive this run?
decisionResponsibilities.userChoiceWhen: No direct interaction; Warden approval gates durable writeback.

capabilityDiscovery.principle: Fetch discovers evidence, Thinking matches capabilities; never hardcode an agent before discovery.
minimumSources: previous run state and learned evolution records

productExperienceCoreGoals.goalContractMethod: outcome + verification + constraints + boundaries + iteration + completion evidence + stop/pause
capabilityInvocationTruthRequirements: stateTaxonomy includes invoked, applied, host_visible_observed, selected_not_invoked, discovered_not_selected, unavailable, not_authorized, blocked, not_required

agent/subagent live invocation is invoked only with external agent spawn evidence; otherwise use unavailable, not_authorized, blocked, not_required, or selected_not_invoked according to host-tool availability and authorization evidence
app-visible host UI subagents are recorded separately from runner Agent/spawn_agent tool invocation
agent-teams-playbook is selected for 2+ executable parallel lanes but is not relabeled as a live Skill/Agent Team/spawn_agent call
MCP binding or --self-test catalog output is not relabeled as an MCP tool call; live proof requires an externally observed tools/call result
hook match or file is not relabeled as triggered hook
command selection is not relabeled as command execution without fresh command output
runner-generated worker plans are planned_not_executed and never synthesize executed, verified, or exitCode 0 evidence
realInvocationCoverage is binding-level, so every selected family+provider+task binding must have matching externally observed evidence

realInvocationCoverage.status must be pass for product-experience pass when selected executable bindings include agent/subagent, skill, MCP, hook, command/script, runtime-tool, or agent-teams-playbook
hostInvocationRequestPacket must list every selected executable family that still needs a Claude Code/Codex host adapter call and the exact trusted evidence required
selected_not_invoked is never execution pass for a selected executable family
capabilityInvocationProbePacket proves readiness/callability only and never contributes to realInvocationCoverage or product-experience live evidence

P-106: Codex branch-changing choices require request_user_input before Execution
Claude Code branch-changing choices require AskUserQuestion before Execution
chat card, markdown card, hook warning, CLI notice, fixture transcript, or after-the-fact insertion cannot be native-popup proof
structural runner may record not_claimed_by_structural_runner but must not claim native live pass
P-107: same failure class appearing a second time means bottom_design_failure
changed design or evidence path is required before another attempt
regression test or scar must record the prevention rule
P-108: durable goals, PRD, contracts, validators, and prompts stay task-agnostic
desktop sticky notes or other fixtures may test the framework but cannot become the framework goal
demo app stack, file path, or one-off product request cannot be a pass criterion
P-109: capabilityInvocationTruthPacket.rows covers agent/subagent, app-visible host subagent, worker task, skill, MCP, hook, prompt/rule, command/script, and runtime tool families
capabilityInvocationTruthPacket.rows also records agent_teams_playbook when fan-out orchestration is selected
each family records invoked, applied, host_visible_observed, selected_not_invoked, discovered_not_selected, unavailable, not_authorized, blocked, or not_required
selected, discovered, configured, or matched capabilities cannot be displayed as invoked without attached invocation evidence
run-scoped worker execution and app-visible host subagent UI evidence cannot be displayed as live runner Agent/spawn_agent invocation
MCP config/binding and hook file/match cannot be displayed as MCP call or hook trigger
callableInvocationCoverage reports readiness probes separately from live invocation truth

realInvocationCoverage.status must be pass at binding level for product-experience pass when any selected executable binding needs host, skill, MCP, hook, command, runtime-tool, or agent-team evidence
live evidence must come from a hash-verified external runtime observation artifact with matching runId, sessionId, eventId, providerId, bindingRef, timestamp, and successful result
hostInvocationRequestPacket.status must expose pending_host_invocation instead of hiding missing host calls inside reports
P-110: agentTeamsPlaybookPacket is not_required for fewer than 2 executable worker lanes
2+ executable worker lanes must discover and select agent-teams-playbook as the fan-out orchestration adapter

fan-out waves use the current host/runtime capacity such as Codex [agents].max_threads or Claude Code's native dispatch capacity, not an arbitrary Meta_Kim hard cap, prove DAG/collision/workspace/external-write safety, and preserve workerTaskPackets
the Node runner must not claim a live Skill, Agent Team, or Codex spawn_agent call without host tool-call evidence

blocksOn: unresolved high or critical review finding
